response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and 20 years of broad technical leadership experience, he lacks the critical domain expertise this role requires. No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, or data analysis—all core responsibilities of a Principal Growth/Experimentation Systems engineer. His background is predominantly in full-stack development, GIS platforms, and data processing, not growth or experimentation systems.
strengths: 20 years of broad technical experience with demonstrated ability to architect and ship systems at scale (millions of requests/second, millions of transactions annually)
Staff/Principal-level technical leadership roles showing system design, mentorship, and cross-domain problem-solving capabilities
Strong software engineering fundamentals with proven emphasis on testing, code quality, and production craftsmanship
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature-flagging systems, or rollout automation—core responsibilities of this role
Lacks metrics/telemetry infrastructure or data analysis background required for growth engineering and experimentation quality oversight
Recent role at re:cinq focuses on AI tooling and developer infrastructure rather than growth measurement or experimentation systems

key_factors.factor: Broad technical leadership and scale experience
